name_cn:
Premium quality, high version
DIOR ❤️TOUJOURS Handbag [Black Large]
This Dior Toujours handbag made its debut at the Fall/Winter 2023 show, featuring a unique, casual, and practical design. Crafted from black calfskin, it features oversized woven quilting stitching. The spacious interior compartment includes a small pocket for neatly organizing daily essentials. It features a leather strap closure for secure storage, along with a CD Lock letter D turn-knob closure. The adjustable sides enhance its elegance. The large size features a leather handle with adjustable details, suitable for hand-carry or shoulder wear.
CD Lock and strap closure
D.I.O.R. charm
Removable inner pocket
Adjustable leather handle
Includes dust bag
Model: 2823
Dimensions: 37 x 20 x 28.5 cm
Handle length: 14 - 29 cm
